title: Histogram to see available time or resources
excerpt: The implemented Workload widget give a easy way to see in a visual way that a resource is available, fully booked or overbooked. BUT it does not give any good way to see how much resources are available on a planning lev…

posts.author: Jstubbe (Jo Inge Stubbe)
posts.cookedHtml:
The implemented Workload widget give a easy way to see in a visual way that a resource is available, fully booked or overbooked. BUT it does not give any good way to see how much resources are available on a planning level.

We really miss a Histogram that shows all hours available, booked, and “Total available”
f.ex

  • resource A should work hours every day, he is booked 4 hours and are available for 4
  • resource A should work hours every day, he is booked 3 hours and are available for 5
  • resource A should work hours every day, he is booked 7 hours and are available for 1
  • resource A should work hours every day, he is booked 8 hours and are available for 0

With a histogram I whould with a glimpse see how many hours are available, produced and so on… Today I need to click into everyone and register the hours beside and calculate it… Which is almost hopeless if you got a project portfolio

really looking forward for a better way to visualize that one
